# Visual Consistency Checklist

## Semantic Review

- Does each common action have a stable icon treatment?
- Are status and priority cues consistent across the product?
- Are icons used only where they improve recognition or scanning?

## Style Review

- Are stroke, fill, and detail level consistent?
- Are icons aligned well with surrounding text and controls?
- Do badges, chips, and alerts share a coherent visual grammar?

## Accessibility Review

- Are icon-only controls labeled accessibly?
- Are color and icon cues reinforced with text when needed?
- Do visuals remain understandable in varied themes and states?
